category_sources: source_facts.description says it embeds files into a Go executable; official GitHub README says statik embeds a directory of static files into a Go binary for serving from an http.FileSystem.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses statik; source_facts.executables contains statik.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README includes installation, usage, HTTP serving example, file access example, deterministic output notes, and project description.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/rakyll/statik; per instruction repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README identify embedding static files into Go executables and serving them through http.FileSystem.
